'''Retep V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
Above that planet, Imperial [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvettes]] [[Thrasher (corvette group)|''Thrasher'']] attempted to destroy a [[Habassa]]n convoy of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was concerned and [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] attempted to save about half of the [[Starlifter]] freighters. After that, the Habassa tended towards the Rebellion and finally joined it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
